description: Create a sidebar-left content slide on the metaverse and virtualized society, with a highlighted left text panel and a right-side bullet list of implications.

header.headline: From Facebook to the metaverse – Are social media just the launch pad for a profoundly dynamic change of global society?
header.sub: The next big thing: The metaverse creates a virtualized society

left.title: Metaverse
left.body: The metaverse enables our current daily life to completely move to a digital and virtual world, ultimately having a profound impact on society

items.text: The metaverse creates a virtualized society
